title: Reliance Industries Announces Major Investment in AI and Green Energy
description: Mukesh Ambani-led Reliance Industries has announced a $10 billion investment in developing local AI models and expanding its green energy footprint in India.
content: Reliance Industries is poised to lead India's AI revolution by investing heavily in data centers and local-language LLMs...

title: TATA Group to Set Up Semiconductor Fab in Gujarat
description: Tata Electronics has partnered with PSMC to build India's first mega semiconductor fabrication plant in Dholera.
content: The plant will manufacture chips for automotive, power and electronics sectors, marking a major step towards 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat'...

title: RBI Keeps Repo Rate Unchanged at 6.5%
description: The Monetary Policy Committee decided to maintain the status quo on interest rates while keeping a close watch on inflation targets.
content: RBI Governor Shaktikanta Das highlighted that the Indian economy remains resilient amidst global headwinds...

title: ISRO Successfully Launches Next-Gen Communication Satellite
description: The Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) successfully placed the GSAT-N20 satellite into orbit, enhancing high-speed connectivity.
content: The launch from Sriharikota marks a significant milestone for ISRO as it moves towards more frequent commercial missions...

title: OpenAI Launches India-Focused AI Hackathon
description: OpenAI has announced a major developer challenge in Bengaluru to build applications using GPT-4 for local Indian languages.
content: The initiative aims to support the growing AI ecosystem in India and provide developers with access to advanced models...

title: India Becomes the Largest User Hub for GitHub AI Tools
description: Microsoft reported that Indian developers are the fastest adopters of GitHub Copilot, contributing significantly to global open source projects.
content: With over 13 million developers, India is poised to lead the next wavefront of AI-driven software development...

title: General Assembly Passes New Environmental Protection Bill
description: A landmark bill aiming to reduce plastic waste and promote sustainable urban development was passed today.
content: The bill introduces strict penalties for single-use plastic violations and provides incentives for green startups...

title: Election Commission Announces Dates for Assembly Elections
description: Five states will go to polls starting next month, with results expected by the end of May.
content: The Chief Election Commissioner emphasized that all arrangements have been made for a free and fair polling process...

title: World Leaders Congratulate India on G20 Legacy Projects
description: The Digital Public Infrastructure initiative launched during India's G20 presidency has been adopted by 12 other nations.
content: The 'India Stack' continues to be a template for global digital transformation and financial inclusion...

title: India Wins Thrilling T20 Match Against Australia
description: A last-ball boundary secured a 3-wicket victory for India in the final match of the series.
content: In a match that swung back and forth, the Indian middle order held their nerve under intense pressure...

title: Neeraj Chopra Sets New National Record at Diamond League
description: The 'Golden Boy' of Indian athletics threw a massive 90.15m to clinch the top spot in Lausanne.
content: Chopra's performance solidifies his position as the world's most consistent javelin thrower heading into the championships...

title: IPL 2026: Mumbai Indians Unveil New Young Captain
description: In a surprise move, the franchise has appointed a 22-year-old rising star to lead the team this season.
content: The decision marks a generational shift for the most successful IPL franchise as they aim for their 6th title...

title: New Sci-Fi Epic Breaks Box Office Records in Opening Weekend
description: The latest masterpiece from director Christopher Nolan has become the highest-grossing opening in India.
content: Audiences are praising the film's visual effects and philosophical depth...

title: Major Streaming Platforms Announce 50 New Indian Originals
description: Netflix and Amazon Prime Video have revealed a massive slate of local series and films for the next 18 months.
content: The investment highlights the growing importance of regional Indian content for global digital audiences...

title: Bollywood Legend Honored with Lifetime Achievement Award
description: The veteran actor received a standing ovation at the international film festival for five decades of contribution.
content: The ceremony was attended by the biggest names in the industry who celebrated the iconic career of the star...

title: Breakthrough in Fusion Energy Research Reported
description: Researchers in Bangalore have achieved a record-breaking plasma duration.
content: The experiment used a novel magnetic containment field design that significantly reduced instability...

title: New Species of Ancient Flora Discovered in Western Ghats
description: Botanists have identified a rare plant species that dates back to the Cretaceous period, surviving in deep valleys.
content: The discovery provides vital clues about the evolution of biodiversity in the Indian subcontinent millions of years ago...

title: India's First Deep Sea Mission 'Samudrayaan' Ready for Trials
description: The MATSYA 6000 submersible is set to undergo deep-water test dives off the coast of Chennai next week.
content: The mission aims to explore biodiversity and mineral resources at depths of 6000 meters in the Indian Ocean...

title: Finance Ministry Outlines Post-Budget Implementation Strategy
description: The Finance Ministry has released a detailed roadmap for implementing the key announcements from the Union Budget 2026-27.
content: Special focus will be on capital expenditure and rural development projects as highlighted in the recent budgetary session...
